title: Better Items
description: Improves On The Default Minecraft Textures!
body:
#
This Texture Pack Makes Items Look better and Helps you with PVP

# How Does This Texture Pack Help You in PVP?

Well, This Texture Pack Makes Swords Shorter So It Will **Not** Block half your screen!

# What It Features.

This Texture pack makes **ALL** your swords smaller including the Diamond Sword, Iron Sword, Stone Sword, And even the Wooden Sword.

# Shorter Items.

Shorter Items, This Texture Pack Makes All your Swords Smaller, This Texture Pack Also Makes Items smaller Items such as Ender Pearls, Totems Of Undying, All Food Items,  And Even Potions.

# Textures

Now Textures Such as the "Shield" and the "End Crystals" have been modified, So This Will Make The Shields Smaller So it Isn't blocking half your screen, And The End Crystals Are Now 3D When They Are In a Players Hand, Which Just Looks and feels better.
